memberdef.argsstring: (const float *scores, int num_tokens, int n_experts, int k, int *indices, float *weights)
memberdef.name: topk_batched_f32

briefdescription.para: Batched top-K selection for multiple tokens.

parameterdescription.para: Number of experts to select per token
Output: routing weights [num_tokens, k] (can be NULL for no softmax)

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *scores, int n, int k, int *indices, float *values)
memberdef.name: topk_f32

briefdescription.para: Find top-K indices and values from a score vector.

parameterdescription.para: Number of scores (e.g., number of experts)
Number of top scores to select
Output: indices of top-K scores [k], sorted descending by value
Output: top-K score values [k], sorted descending (can be NULL)

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *scores, int n, int k, int *indices, float *weights)
memberdef.name: topk_softmax_f32

briefdescription.para: Find top-K indices with softmax-normalized weights.

parameterdescription.para: Number of top scores to select
Output: softmax-normalized weights for selected [k], sum to 1.0

briefdescription.para: Top-K selection kernels for MoE router dispatch.

sect1.title: CK-ENGINE KERNEL RULES:

listitem.para: NO malloc/free - memory via bump allocator, pointers passed in
NO OpenMP - parallelization at orchestrator/codegen layer
API must define: inputs, outputs, workspace, and memory layouts
Pure computation - deterministic, no side effects

sect1.para: After changes: make test && make llamacpp-parity-full
Provides efficient top-K selection from a score vector. Used in Mixture-of-Experts models to select which experts process each token.

Operations:
topk_f32: Find top-K indices and values from N scores
topk_softmax_f32: Top-K with softmax normalization of selected scores
